Letra_cifra:
Fm = Am
D# = G
C# = F
G# = C

Live-version played 2 steps down with
Fm -> D#m (or capo 6th fret Am)
D# -> C# (or capo 6th fret G)
C# -> B (or capo 6th fret F)
G# -> F# (or capo 6th fret C)
